creator: beastie@tardisi.com
text:
Darn, you beat me getting this in....though trying to figure out how to use bugz to submit kind of delayed things.

The biggest delay was figuring out that I need to specify a status, to get search to find anything.  Now to figure out what statuses I want to include when I don't want 'ALL'.

Also its not exactly easy...pretty much all the status codes don't match the site's documentation.  Or that 'ports' is now 'Ports Tree', and that component is 'Individual Port(s)'....having dug further in what what the other stuff is.

Guess, I'll just stick with send-pr and/or web interface.
